---
title: "nitrix.smoothing.gaussian"
generated: true
signature-hash: 10676c6312686b68
description: "Separable n-D Gaussian filter."
listing:
  id: nitrix-smoothing-gaussian-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-smoothing-gaussian/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.smoothing.gaussian`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Separable n-D Gaussian filter.

The unconditional baseline smoother.  Pure JAX -- uses
`lax.conv_general_dilated` for the underlying 1D convolutions
(the algebra is real-valued, so the tensor-core fast path is
available for free).  The n-D Gaussian factors exactly as a product
of 1D Gaussians, so we convolve along each spatial axis serially.

Padding modes match `scipy.ndimage.gaussian_filter`: default
`"reflect"` (the medical-imaging convention -- preserves boundary
intensities), with `"constant"` and `"edge"` also supported.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-smoothing-gaussian-symbols}
:::
